did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The study used line-field confocal optical coherence tomography (LC-OCT) and dermoscopy for imaging, with diagnosis and feature extraction performed by human experts (blinded imaging experts). Statistical analysis was limited to logistic regression for identifying key morphological features, which is a standard statistical method, not AI or machine learning.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
